serviceNotes.engine oil: CBS oil service MFR 30,000 km / 24 months EU maximum with Long-Life oil (SIB B000214 / service display).
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: Changed from 60,000 km to 90,000 km: air filter every third engine oil service (3 × 30,000 km CBS ceiling).
serviceNotes.spark plugs: Long-life plugs every third oil service (90,000 km at 30,000 km oil ceiling).

serviceSources.engine oil: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS intervals) — 30,000 km / 24 months EU maximum. https://garage.wiki/bmw/5-series-sedan/fifth-generation-e60/2007/service-intervals.html
serviceSources.micro filter: https://garage.wiki/bmw/5-series-sedan/fifth-generation-e60/2007/service-intervals.html — interior filter each engine oil change
serviceSources.brake fluid: https://garage.wiki/bmw/5-series-sedan/fifth-generation-e60/2007/service-intervals.html — every 2 years; BMW owner's manual E60
serviceSources.air cleaner element: Changed from 60,000 km to 90,000 km per https://garage.wiki/bmw/5-series-sedan/fifth-generation-e60/2007/service-intervals.html — air filter each third engine oil change
serviceSources.spark plugs: https://garage.wiki/bmw/5-series-sedan/fifth-generation-e60/2007/service-intervals.html — spark plugs each third engine oil change (90,000 km)
serviceSources.check front brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS brake service); 30,000 km planning interval
serviceSources.check rear brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS brake service); 30,000 km planning interval
serviceSources.vehicle check: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 — vehicle check every second engine oil service (60,000 km)
